title: SweetFangSMP
body:
SweetFangSMP Modpack 

Welcome to SweetFangSMP a modpack built for the SweetFangSMP chill vibes and creative fun. Whether you're decorating your base with custom furniture or just hanging out with friends this pack keeps things simple smooth and stylish.

🪑 Features:
- 🛋️ Custom furniture for cozy builds and aesthetic flair  
- 🌸 Perfectly tuned no lag, just smooth player experience  
- 🎮 Easy setup with curated compatibility no config headaches just launch and play!  
- 🧩 Handpicked mods for creativity comfort and chill exploration  

No grind. No chaos. Just good times, good builds, and good company.


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

[Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)

[Sit Anywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/sit-anywhere!)

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework/files/6801528)

[Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture/files/6820260)
  
</details>
